title: "Belshazzar Had A Letter,"
content:
Belshazzar had a letter, --
    He never had but one;
    Belshazzar's correspondent
    Concluded and begun
    In that immortal copy
    The conscience of us all
    Can read without its glasses
    On revelation's wall.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in ""Belshazzar Had A Letter,""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
